text: Last class we ordered a meal at a restaurant.
Today we make a phone call at work.
Hello, can I speak to Marcos?
Can I speak to the manager, please?
Hello, good morning. Can I speak to Marcos, please?
Hello! This is Marcos speaking. Who is the caller?
This is Dienane speaking, from HR. I have a quick question.
Of course. Hold on, please. I need to find the file.
Thank you. And if you are busy, can you take a message later?
Yes, of course. I am here now. Please, tell me your question!
I will call you back soon.

Hello, this is the voicemail of Dienane from HR. I am sorry, I cannot answer your call right now. Please leave a short message after the tone. Tell me your name, your phone number, and the reason for your call. I will call you back very soon. If it is urgent, please call my coworker Marcos. Thank you for calling, and have a great day. Goodbye!

Good morning, this is Marcos speaking. Thank you for calling our office. Right now I am very busy with a meeting. If you want to speak to me, please call again at two o'clock. If you have a quick question, you can leave a message with my assistant. Please do not forget to say your name and your company. I always answer every message. Thank you for your patience, and goodbye.
First, say hello and your name. Then ask, can I speak to the manager, please. Next, wait and hold on. After that, leave your message. Finally, say thank you and goodbye.
Can I speak to the manager, please?
I will call you back soon.
The caller wants to speak to you.
